modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks non-English as their first language.
You should write the description in symptom-first manner and use a formal and professional tone. The writing should have reasonable amount of detail and show moderate technical familiarity. There should be no spelling errors and some redundant repeated information.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Outlook meetings automatically include Teams meeting information.

full_description_text: 
The user is experiencing an issue where every time they create a meeting in Microsoft Outlook, it automatically adds Microsoft Teams meeting details, including connection information in the meeting notes. This behavior alters the intended location of the meeting, causing confusion and inconvenience. The user seeks assistance in removing the default Teams meeting information from their Outlook invites to regain control over their meeting settings.
short_description: Outlook meetings automatically include Teams meeting information.
